description: An existing customer is eligible for a phone upgrade. The agent's goal is to sell them a new device.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and confirm their upgrade eligibility.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the customer can upgrade their device.

nodes.task_description: Present the latest flagship phone models with their financing options.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly presents the features and costs of new phones.

nodes.task_description: Process the order for the new phone selected by the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully completes the sale and arranges for shipping.
